audience: Owners and operations leaders in established Sydney service businesses
problem: Routine customer updates work is spread across people and systems, creating checking, chasing and double handling.
single_message: Send predictable progress updates without losing the personal relationship
supporting_points: Map the real workflow before choosing technology
Automate repeated movement and rule-based actions
Keep exceptions, relationships and accountability human
angle: Send predictable progress updates without losing the personal relationship
headline_options: Send predictable progress updates without losing the personal relationship

selected_hook: The hidden work around customer updates
caption_cta: Save this for your next process review
visual_concept: A before after that makes the repeated steps and the human decision point visible

promotion_hypothesis: The customer updates problem is recognisable, the hook is direct and the visual can explain a practical improvement without hype.
